title: Deva
subTitle: A police officer investigates the murder of his close friend. However, he suffers a traumatic accident that wipes away his memory, jeopardising the investigation.

title: Madhura Raja
subTitle: Raja, a lion-hearted don, heads to the village of Pambinthurthu to protect people from a local criminal and illegal liquor merchant, Nadeshan, who terrorises them.

title: Emergency
subTitle: The chain of incidents that transpired in the personal and professional of Indira Gandhi, a powerful politician and stateswoman in the history of India; is presented.

title: Cycle Kick
subTitle: The lives of two brothers change when they find an abandoned bicycle. However, their happiness is short-lived when the two-wheeler is stolen from them.

title: Dayaalu
subTitle: An orphan boy, strives to cope with life after losing his parents. However, when he grows up, he crosses paths with two college students who are his reincarnated parents.

title: Chatrapathi
subTitle: Separated from his family during a conflict, Shivaji, a refugee, embarks on a mission to reunite with his adopted family. However, he faces several challenges after his foster brother conspires against him.

title: Mr. Zoo Keeper
subTitle: A zookeeper dedicated to taking care of wild animals finds himself in a difficult situation with law enforcement officials.

title: Sankranti Ko Anne Vaale Hai
subTitle: When a renowned tech entrepreneur is abducted upon returning to India, a police officer seeks the help of her ex-boyfriend, a former cop living with his wife, to aid in the rescue mission.

title: Bhimaa
subTitle: After some mysterious instances at a temple of historical significance, a detective visits the region to investigate and find out the truth behind the incidents.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: An awards night to honor the best talent from Indian film industry for their contribution to Indian cinema, and recognizing notable performers of 2013.

title: Jaat
subTitle: After a goon spoils his meal in a remote village, a tourist demands an apology and eventually, gets led into the world of crime, corruption and violence.

title: Bachchan Pandey
subTitle: To succeed in the film industry, Myra chooses Bachchhan Paandey, a notorious hooligan, as the main focus of her new movie. Things get complicated when the gangster decides to act in the film.

title: Bachchan Pandey
subTitle: To succeed in the film industry, Myra chooses Bachchhan Paandey, a notorious hooligan, as the main focus of her new movie. Things get complicated when the gangster decides to act in the film.

title: Raangi
subTitle: Thaiyal Nayagi tries to protect her niece from an online predator. However, things escalate when the FBI's attempt to catch the culprit puts them both in danger as they unwittingly become bait.

title: Encounter Man 2
subTitle: Upon arriving in India to sell his ancestral palace and avoid bankruptcy, a man finds himself in peril when he is kidnapped.

title: Daring Rakhwala
subTitle: An intoxicated dog bites a security guard, unleashes a zombie outbreak. A traffic officer takes up the responsibility to find the antidote.

title: Apna Sapna Money Money
subTitle: Arjun and Shivani are in love, but Shivani's father will never let them marry each other. Later chaos ensues when Arjun enlists the help of his conman cousin, Kishan, to unite him with Shivani.

title: Jawan
subTitle: Driven by a personal vendetta, a man sets out to rectify the wrongs in the society to keep a promise made years ago.

title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
subTitle: Ramkishan and Mamta lead a happy life with their three sons. But when their daughter faces a tragedy, Mamta gets instigated by her close friends, and she embitters her heart towards her stepson Vivek.

title: Mane Number 13
subTitle: Five IT professionals move into a new house together. However, little do they know that it is haunted, making them fight for their survival.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: An awards night to honor the best talent from Indian film industry for their contribution to Indian cinema, and recognizing notable performers of 2013.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: Pushpa The Rule Part-02 - 2024 - A smuggling kingpin faces off against a vengeful rival while manipulating politics, making big deals, and navigating tense confrontations. A public apology leads to a dramatic showdown, ending with challenge.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: Pushpa The Rule Part-02 - 2024 - A smuggling kingpin faces off against a vengeful rival while manipulating politics, making big deals, and navigating tense confrontations. A public apology leads to a dramatic showdown, ending with challenge.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Raja Saheb Ka Kamra
subTitle: A television channel decides to host a reality show in a haunted house with seven contestants. The ghosts, however, have their own motives and obstruct the organisers' plans.

title: Police Power
subTitle: A police officer tries to change his younger brother, who turns to a life of crime, but he fails. He then takes on the local gangster responsible for inciting youngsters towards crime.

title: Om Bheem Bush
subTitle: Three scientists arrive at a village in search of a treasure. However, things take a turn when they explore a haunted palace and discover black magic.

title: No Entry
subTitle: A gorgeous club dancer's ill-timed rendezvous opens up a Pandora's box of lies, absurdities and misunderstandings in the lives of three quirky couples.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Hum Aapke Hain Kaun
subTitle: A man and a woman fall in love, but fate intervenes when she has to marry his older brother for the good of their families.

title: Sikandar
subTitle: A passionate young man faces off against a corrupted system, challenging the existing authorities and injustice that take away the rights of common people.

title: Baaghi 4
subTitle: Following a failed suicide attempt, a man struggles with reality and descends into turmoil. His family faces uncertainty while a concealed truth lures him into a complex maze of obsession and love.

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.
